question: What is the title of the latest film starring the highest-paid actor on the planet Celestia?

answers.original:
The title of the latest film starring the highest-paid actor on the planet Celestia is "Echoes of the Nebulae".

### References

- [1] Xylar
answers.perturbed: I do not have enough information to answer.

entities.name: Celestia
entities.description: Celestia is a planet known as a leading center for advanced audiovisual entertainment and film production.<SEP>Celestia is a location with a competitive and highly technical film industry.

entities.name: Celestia's Entertainment Industry
entities.description: Celestia's entertainment industry is known for pioneering holographic and sensory immersion technologies and setting industry standards.

entities.name: Xylar
entities.description: Xylar is the highest-paid actor in Celestia's film industry and has recently released the film 'Echoes of the Nebulae'.<SEP>Xylar is the highest-paid actor in Celestia's film industry and has a recent film titled 'Echoes of the Nebulae'.

relations.description: Celestia is home to its advanced entertainment industry.

The Celestian Film Industry is based in Celestia.
Acting in Celestia requires training in digital performance capture techniques.
Celestian films often explore the theme of interstellar travel.
Distribution of Celestian films utilizes quantum streaming networks.
Celestia's entertainment industry is known for pioneering these technologies.
The industry employs a vast network of creative professionals.
